episodes.title: Bill Clinton testifies before Congress in Epstein investigation: a first for a former U.S. president
episodes.description:
Bill Clinton is set to answer questions under subpoena before the House Oversight Committee's Epstein investigation, the first time a former president has testified.

Read more on KCENTV.COM

episodes.title: Justice Department expands review of Epstein files
episodes.description:
